rules:

- Give concise, direct responses. No conversational filler.
- Always use the local environment in .venv
- Try to not add new files unless really necessary or requested.
- If possible do only minor changes.
- If modifying existing code, retain all original comments and documentation unless they are explicitly invalidated
- start every message with 'Hello penguin!' and end with 'Goodbye penguin!'
- never hide errors behind try/catch or if statements. If an error is likely to occur, let it happen and be visible.
